description: Optimize a channel named 'Provider_Enrichment' for high-throughput enrichment by caching reference data from '/home/ga/reference/providers.csv' (Format: ProviderID,LastName,FirstName) in the Global Channel Map. The channel must read HL7 ADT messages from '/home/ga/inbound_hl7' every 5 seconds and write them to '/home/ga/outbound_hl7' using a File Writer. Load the CSV data into the globalChannelMap using the ProviderID as the key during channel deployment. Populate the Provider Name fields PV1-7.2 (LastName) and PV1-7.3 (FirstName) by looking up the Provider ID from PV1-7.1 in the cached map, ensuring the reference file is not accessed during the message transformation process.
